/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libstm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libstm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/stm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/stm32_diff_drive_msgs/msg/motor_command__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/stm32_diff_drive_msgs/msg/motor_vels__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/stm32_diff_drive_msgs/msg/encoder_vals__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/giang/ros2_myrobot/build/stm32_diff_drive_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libstm32_diff_drive_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
